body.raw:
# Tabs ## Import ```jsx live=false import { Tabs, TabList, TabPanels, Tab, TabPanel } from '@totejs/uikit'; ``` ## Usage ```jsx One Two Three

one!

two!

three!

 ``` ## Status ### isDisabled ```jsx One Two Three

one!

two!

three!

 ``` ## Lazily mounting tab panels By default, the `Tabs` component renders all tabs content to the DOM, meaning that invisible tabs are still rendered but are hidden by styles. If you want to defer rendering of each tab until that tab is selected, you can use the `isLazy` prop. This is useful if your tabs require heavy performance, or make network calls on mount that should only happen when the component is displayed. ```jsx One Two {/* initially mounted */}

one!

 {/* initially not mounted */}

two!

 ``` ## Props ### Tabs Props void', default: '', desc: 'Callback when the index (controlled or un-controlled) changes.', }, ]} /> ### Tab Props
